creator: kevans@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 192194
shar(1) archive of devel/py-emoji

Supports both Python 2 and Python 3. Supports various aliases for Emojis, as well as Emojis defined by the Unicode Consortium.

This will be used for the revival of www/py-octoprint.

Tested with: Poudriere
Looked over with: Portlint -cAC
